items.title: Threat of further violence looms after Mexican cartel rampage
items.description: The BBC speaks to Guadalajara residents days after cartel members sought to avenge the killing of Nemesio "El Mencho" Oseguera.

items.title: US ambassador to France set for talks with foreign minister after row
items.description: Charles Kushner has spoken to France's foreign minister after failing to respond to a summons on Monday.

items.title: Nigeria denies report it paid 'huge' ransom to free pupils in mass abduction
items.description: The rebuttal was followed by news the police chief was resigning a year before the end of his term.

items.title: Ukraine remembers its dead as war enters a fifth year
items.description: Events were held across Ukraine to mark four years since Russia launched its full-scale invasion.

items.title: Floods and landslides in Brazil kill at least 20
items.description: Hundreds of people have been displaced and dozens are missing, with rescue operations still ongoing in Juiz de Fora.
